name: Pecan Crusted Venison with Bourbon Mash
recipeIngredient: 6 Whole sweet potatoes; roasted, skin left on, warm
recipeInstructions:
For the venison: Pulse the pecans in a food processor until coarse, but not pureed. Add bread crumbs and Essence. Season each medallion with salt and pepper. Rub each medallion with Creole mustard, coating all sides. Crust each medallion completely with the pecan mixture (every inch must be covered). For the mash: Roast sweet potatoes for 40 minutes at 425°F. Remove skin and place in a saucepot. Mash over low heat, adding cream, bourbon, and butter until smooth with small lumps. Season with salt and pepper. Finish venison by heating olive oil in a pan. When hot, add medallions and sauté for 3 minutes per side for medium rare.
Source: Essence of Emeril, #EE2298, TVFN
